step_rationale: Regulates metabolic genes; dysregulation alters lipid metabolism and hypoxia response in atherosclerotic lesions.
mechanism: miR-210 suppresses lipid-oxidation pathways and promotes hypoxic responses, modulating plaque lipid metabolism and inflammation.

references.title: Integrated high-throughput miRNomics and lipidomics in mice with altered lipoprotein metabolism.
